tasks.subject: Task 0: Server colour mutex (selectColor)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A server-authoritative `selectColor` lets a player claim a free palette hue; the room player object gains an additive `colorHue`; `toClientState` is proven to carry it and never `stableId`.

**Files:** Modify server/constants.js (L19-21 add SEAT_HUES + export); server/systems/lobbySystem.js (add selectColor after assignTeam L282 + module.exports L853-871); server/socketHandlers.js (one on('selectColor') block after assignTeam wiring L209-212). Create server/systems/lobbySystem.selectcolor.test.js; server/gameLogic.colorhue.test.js. gameLogic.js toClientState BYTE-IDENTICAL.

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-5-3 && npx jest server (incl. 2 new suites) green; then full cd C:/mm-phase7-5-3 && npx jest green.

**Steps:** TDD — write the selectcolor + colorhue server suites (harness mirrors lobbySystem.botlifecycle.test.js: jest.mock('../redisUtils'), withLobbyLock.mockImplementation runs fn(global.__room), lobby() factory, broadcastState spy) → verify FAIL (selectColor undefined) → add constants.SEAT_HUES=Object.freeze([350,25,45,140,188,220,270,312]) + the verbatim selectColor (assignTeam-shaped, claim-only effective-hue mutex, status==='waiting', findIndex self, validate hue∈SEAT_HUES, RMW under withLobbyLock) + module.exports + one on('selectColor') behind lobbyConfigLimited → verify GREEN → diff-gate (gameLogic.js EMPTY; socketHandlers = exactly one block) → full npx jest → branch-verify + commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/constants.js", "server/systems/lobbySystem.js", "server/socketHandlers.js", "server/systems/lobbySystem.selectcolor.test.js", "server/gameLogic.colorhue.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5-3 && npx jest server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["constants.SEAT_HUES === frozen [350,25,45,140,188,220,270,312] (len 8)", "selectColor claims a free in-palette hue + broadcasts; declines off-palette/non-int, taken (explicit OR un-picked slot fallback), status!=='waiting', non-member; hue freed on leave; RMW under withLobbyLock", "toClientState carries colorHue, never stableId (gameLogic.js byte-identical)", "socketHandlers.js diff = exactly one on('selectColor') block; other server/** byte-identical; full npx jest green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Client seam — playerCardModel prefers colorHue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The pure seam returns the picked hue when validly set (else the 7.5.1 slot hue) and exposes `hasPickedColor`; un-picked players stay byte-identical to 7.5.2.

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/red-carpet.js (playerCardModel body L130-145); client-tests/red-carpet.test.js (extend playerCardModel describe + exact-literal SEAT_HUES pin). ui-render.js + 02-hero-lobby.css UNTOUCHED.

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-5-3 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js green; then full cd C:/mm-phase7-5-3 && npx jest green.

**Steps:** TDD — append the colorHue prefer/fallback + hasPickedColor + exact-literal SEAT_HUES describe blocks to red-carpet.test.js → verify FAIL (hasPickedColor undefined) → replace L130-132 with slotHue + hasPickedColor=(Number.isInteger(p.colorHue)&&SEAT_HUES.includes(p.colorHue)) + accentHue=hasPickedColor?p.colorHue:slotHue, add hasPickedColor to the return → verify GREEN → diff-gate (ui-render.js + 02-hero-lobby.css EMPTY) → full npx jest (3 lobby suites unaffected — additive) → branch-verify + commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/red-carpet.js", "client-tests/red-carpet.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5-3 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no colorHue → accentHue==SEAT_HUES[slot], hasPickedColor false (byte-identical 7.5.2)", "valid in-palette colorHue → accentHue==colorHue, hasPickedColor true; off-palette/non-int/absent → slot fallback, not picked", "SEAT_HUES deep-equals [350,25,45,140,188,220,270,312] (both-sides pin); SECURITY sentinel holds; red-carpet.js still pure zero-import", "ui-render.js & 02-hero-lobby.css diff vs ed6f041 EMPTY; full npx jest green (3 lobby suites unaffected)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Client render + CSS — the swatch strip
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The local player's own occupied seat shows a `.seat-swatches` strip; clicking a free swatch emits `selectColor`; a picked seat carries `.has-picked` and the `.seat.is-you` indigo override yields so the picker sees their own colour.

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/ui-render.js (import L33; li.className L216-220; swatch builder after .seat-person append L260). public/css/02-hero-lobby.css (scope L1145 selector to :not(.has-picked); append PHASE 7.5.3 section after L1621; .seat-svg-wrap L1158-1160 verbatim). Extend client-tests/render-lobby.test.js + red-carpet-render.test.js + red-carpet-seat-table.test.js.

**Verify:** full cd C:/mm-phase7-5-3 && npx jest green; plus the git diff CSS-confinement review. Visual/responsive/reduced-motion + a real two-client claim/disable/reject eyeball flagged user-side.

**Steps:** TDD — append swatch/.has-picked/selectColor cases to the 3 lobby suites → verify FAIL (.seat-swatches null) → add SEAT_HUES import + .has-picked to li.className + the createElement swatch builder under card.isYou (effective-hue mutex mirror, is-selected/is-taken/disabled, free→emit selectColor {lobbyId:gameState.id,hue}) + scope .seat.is-you→.seat.is-you:not(.has-picked) + append-only PHASE 7.5.3 CSS (no new colours, no per-rule reduced-motion) → verify GREEN → CSS-confinement diff-gate (one selector edit + EOF append only) + red-carpet.js/server-except-Task0/team byte-identical → full npx jest → branch-verify + commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "public/css/02-hero-lobby.css", "client-tests/render-lobby.test.js", "client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js", "client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5-3 && npx jest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["local player's OWN occupied seat = one .seat-swatches with 8 .swatch; non-you/empty/team = none", "own effective-hue swatch .is-selected+disabled; every other player's effective hue .is-taken+disabled; rest enabled", "free-swatch click emits selectColor {lobbyId:gameState.id,hue}; disabled emit nothing", "valid colorHue → li.has-picked + --avatar-hue == picked hue (indigo override lifted)", "02-hero-lobby.css diff = one scoped .is-you:not(.has-picked) selector + EOF PHASE 7.5.3 append only; .seat-svg-wrap verbatim; red-carpet.js/server-except-Task0/team path byte-identical; full npx jest green"]}
```
